popover.title: Adding a new product
popover.description: We'll walk through listing a new item in the members' store. Click Next when you're ready.

popover.title: Name the product
popover.description: Click in the box and type the product name (for example, Goldwing Cap). This is what members will see in the store.

popover.title: Set the price
popover.description: Type the price in dollars (for example, 25.00). Don't include the dollar sign.

popover.title: How many do you have?
popover.description: Type the number of items you have on hand. The store will count down as members buy them.

popover.title: Add a photo
popover.description: Click Choose Files and pick a photo from your computer. A clear photo helps members see what they're buying.

popover.title: Save the product
popover.description: Click the gold Save product button to make it live. Members can now buy this product.

popover.title: Reviewing applications
popover.description: This is where new membership applications appear. Click Next to walk through approving one.

popover.title: Filter by status
popover.description: Use these tabs to switch between Pending, Approved and Rejected applications. New applications waiting for review sit under Pending.

popover.title: Open the full details
popover.description: Click View to read the applicant's full submission before deciding. You can return to this list using your browser's back button.

popover.title: Assign a chapter
popover.description: Pick the chapter the applicant should belong to from the dropdown, then click Assign. This step is optional but recommended before approval.

popover.title: Approve the application
popover.description:
Click the green tick to open the confirmation dialog, then choose Yes, approve.

The applicant will receive an approval email and become a full member.

popover.title: Reviewing Fallen Wings tributes
popover.description: This page lists all tribute submissions for members who have passed. Click Next to walk through approving one.

popover.title: Pending submissions
popover.description: New tributes waiting for review appear in this list. If it says "No pending submissions", there's nothing to action right now.

popover.title: Read the tribute
popover.description: Each entry shows the member's name, year of passing and the tribute text. Read it carefully and check the image or PDF if one is attached.

popover.title: Reject if needed
popover.description: If the submission isn't suitable, click Reject to remove it from the list. Use this for duplicates or content that needs to be redone.

popover.title: Approve the tribute
popover.description:
When you're satisfied, click Approve.

The tribute is now published on the Fallen Wings page.

popover.title: Creating a new event
popover.description: We'll walk through the four key pieces: name, date, location, and chapter. Click Next to begin.

popover.title: Name your event
popover.description: Type a clear, short title — this is what members will see in the calendar. A description below the title helps members know what to expect.

popover.title: Choose the chapter
popover.description: Pick Chapter for a chapter ride or National for an Australia-wide event. If it's a chapter event, select the chapter from the dropdown.

popover.title: Set the date and time
popover.description: Fill in the start and end times — the timezone defaults to Sydney. Tick All-day event if there are no specific times.

popover.title: Add the location
popover.description: Enter the meeting point and destination so members know where to go. A Google Maps link is helpful but optional.

popover.title: Publish the event
popover.description:
When everything looks right, click Publish Event at the top. Members and area reps will be notified.

Done — your event is up.

popover.title: Finding a member
popover.description: We'll walk through searching for a member and opening their record to edit it. Click in this box and type a name, email, or phone number.

popover.title: Narrow it down by chapter
popover.description: If you know the member's chapter, pick it here to shorten the list. Leave it on All chapters if you're not sure.

popover.title: Filter by status
popover.description: Use this to show only active, pending, or expired members. Leave it on All statuses to see everyone.

popover.title: Apply your filters
popover.description: Click the gold Apply filters button to update the list below. Your matching members will appear underneath.

popover.title: Open the member
popover.description:
Find the member you want in the list, then click their name to open their record. From there you can update their details and save the changes.

That's it — you're ready to edit them!

popover.title: Your events list
popover.description: This table shows every event in the calendar — chapter and national. Click Next to see how to edit and cancel one.

popover.title: Sort and scan the columns
popover.description: Use the columns to find what you need — Title, Chapter, Start and Status. Pending events sit at the top with an amber highlight.

popover.title: View or edit an event
popover.description: Click View on any row to open the event page. From there you can edit details, see RSVPs, and manage registrations.

popover.title: Cancel an event
popover.description: Click Delete on the row to cancel the event — you'll be asked to confirm. This removes the event and all its RSVPs.

popover.title: Add a new event
popover.description:
Click Create Event in the top right to start a new one.

Done — you can manage events with confidence.

popover.title: Processing an order
popover.description: We'll walk through packing and shipping this order. Click Next when you're ready.

popover.title: Check what was ordered
popover.description: This shows the items the member bought and how many of each. Gather these items so you can pack them.

popover.title: Add the tracking details
popover.description: Once the parcel is packed, type the carrier (for example, Australia Post) and the tracking number. Set the date you posted it.

popover.title: Mark it as shipped
popover.description: Click the gold Save tracking + mark shipped button. The buyer will get an email with the tracking number.

popover.title: Need to refund instead?
popover.description: If something went wrong, type an amount here (or leave blank for a full refund) and click Process refund. That's it — the order is marked as shipped and the buyer's been emailed.

popover.title: Posting a notice
popover.description: We'll walk through creating a notice that members see on their dashboard. Click Next to begin.

popover.title: Give it a title
popover.description: Type a short, clear title that members will see in their notice list. Keep it under about ten words.

popover.title: Choose who sees it
popover.description: Pick All members, a single State, or a single Chapter. The State and Chapter dropdowns only enable when you select that option.

popover.title: Write the notice
popover.description: Click into this box and type your message. Use the toolbar above for basic formatting or to add a link.

popover.title: Publish it
popover.description:
When you're happy, click Publish Notice.

The notice is now live on members' dashboards.

popover.title: Extra login security
popover.description: This adds a second step when you log in — a short code from an app on your phone. It keeps your account safe even if someone learns your password.

popover.title: First, grab an app on your phone
popover.description: Open an app like Google Authenticator (free from the App Store or Play Store), tap Add, then point your phone's camera at this square picture.

popover.title: Can't scan? Type this instead
popover.description: If the camera won't read the picture, just type these letters and numbers into the app. Either way works the same.

popover.title: Type the 6-digit code
popover.description: Your phone app will now show a 6-digit code that changes every minute. Type that code into this box.

popover.title: Turn it on
popover.description:
Click Enable 2FA and you're done. Next time you log in, you'll type your password and then a fresh code from your phone.

You did it — your account is now extra safe!

popover.title: G'day — booking a ride
popover.description: We'll walk through finding a ride or event and confirming your spot. Click Next when you're ready.

popover.title: All the upcoming events
popover.description: This is the list of rides and events you can join. Have a scroll and find one that takes your fancy.

popover.title: Pick one you like
popover.description: Each row shows the event name, chapter, and when it's on. Find one that looks good to you.

popover.title: Click View to book
popover.description:
Click View on that row to open the event, then tap the RSVP button to lock in your spot.

That's it — you've booked!

popover.title: The Members Directory
popover.description: This is the list of all your fellow members. Click Next and we'll show you how to look someone up.

popover.title: Search by name
popover.description: Click in this box and type a name or member number. The list below will narrow down as you type.

popover.title: Pick a chapter
popover.description: Want to see members from one chapter only? Click this box and choose a chapter from the list.

popover.title: Their details
popover.description:
Each row shows a member's name, phone and email. Click their phone number to call, or their email to send a message.

That's it — you've done it!

popover.title: Your membership
popover.description: This box shows your membership and any fees that need paying. Click Next to see how to pay.

popover.title: When your membership runs out
popover.description: This is the date your membership ends. If it's getting close, it's time to pay your fees.

popover.title: Pay your fees
popover.description: Click the gold Pay now button (or Renew membership if it's close to expiring). You'll be taken to a safe page to pay with your card.

popover.title: Check your past payments
popover.description:
Down here you can see every fee you've paid.

That's it — you've done it!

popover.title: The Notice Board
popover.description: This is where the club and your chapter share news and notices. Click Next to take a quick look.

popover.title: Choose how you see them
popover.description: Click List view to read notices one under the other. Or click Grid view to see them as little cards.

popover.title: Read the latest notices
popover.description: Each notice shows the title, who posted it, and the date. Scroll down to read the message and see any pictures or PDFs.

popover.title: All done
popover.description:
Pop back here anytime to see what's new.

That's it — you've done it!

popover.title: G'day — welcome to Wings
popover.description: This is the latest Wings magazine, ready to read on your screen. Click Next and we'll show you around.

popover.title: The magazine
popover.description: This is the magazine itself — just like the printed copy. You can read it right here on the page.

popover.title: Turn the page
popover.description: Click this arrow to flip to the next page. There's a matching arrow on the left to go back.

popover.title: Save a copy to your computer
popover.description: Click Download PDF if you'd like to save the magazine to read later or print it out.

popover.title: You're all set
popover.description:
That's it — flip through the pages with the arrows, or download a copy to keep.

Happy reading!

popover.title: Updating your details
popover.description: We'll walk through changing your email or phone number. Click Next when you're ready.

popover.title: Your email address
popover.description: This is where the club sends your magazine and notices. Click in the box and type your new email if you'd like to change it.

popover.title: Your phone number
popover.description: Click in the box and type your new phone number. Don't worry about spaces — type it any way you like.

popover.title: Save your changes
popover.description:
When you're happy, click the gold Save changes button. You'll see a green message at the top to confirm it worked.

That's it — you did it!
